strings.sponsor_block_intro:
SponsorBlock is a crowd-sourced system for skipping annoying parts of YouTube videos.
More information: https://sponsor.ajay.app/
In SakayoriMusic, SponsorBlock is only available when the device is online

strings.author: Author
strings.credit_app:
A simple music app using YouTube Music for backend 

SakayoriMusic is an open source project to stream music from YouTube and YouTube Music without ads and tracking. SakayoriMusic provides many features:

 - Streaming music 
 - Synced lyrics
 - Personalize data
 - etc… 

SakayoriMusic is always free and no ads

Made By Iroha (Sakayori)

strings.guide_suggest_content: Show suggested songs by AI based on your playlist
strings.clear_queue_description: Remove all tracks from the current queue? This cannot be undone.

strings.auto_update_on_restart_description: Download new version in the background while you use the app. Next launch will install automatically.
strings.network_error_subtitle: Check your internet and try again.
strings.sleep_timer_fade_out_description: Gradually lower volume during the last 30 seconds before the sleep timer ends.
strings.try_different_search_terms: Try different search terms or check your spelling.
strings.pull_down_to_refresh: Pull down to refresh, or check your internet connection.
strings.view_privacy_policy_subtitle: Learn what data stays on your device
strings.crash_reporting_description: Send anonymous crash reports to help improve stability. No personal data is collected.

strings.donation: If you love this app, support Sakayori
strings.can_t_delete_from_youtube_playlist: Can't delete song from YouTube Playlist
strings.log_in_warning: YouTube Music now requires you to log in to stream music, Piped Instance sometime can't work too. You should log in to YouTube to get better experience with SakayoriMusic.
strings.proxy_description: Using Proxy to bypass country content blocking
strings.sync_first: Sync this playlist to YouTube Music first
strings.auto_check_for_update_description: Checking for update when you open app

strings.blur_player_background_description: Blurring the background of the now playing screen effect
strings.if_you_enjoy_using_SakayoriMusic_star_Sa: If you enjoy using SakayoriMusic, star SakayoriMusic on GitHub or leave a review on
strings.fade_audio_effect_duration: Fade audio effect duration (ms) (Set to 0 for disable)

strings.kill_service_on_exit_description: Stop background music player when exiting app
strings.crossfade_description: Smoothly transition between songs by fading out the current track while fading in the next one.
strings.crossfade_auto_description: Automatically calculate duration based on BPM (requires 320kbps stream with BPM data)
strings.crossfade_dj_mode_description: Apply low-pass and high-pass filter sweeps during crossfade for a smoother, DJ-like transition (similar to Apple Music Automix).
strings.crossfade_preview_description: Skip to end of current track to preview the crossfade transition
strings.youtube_subtitle_language_message: Type language code (Eg: en) (2 letters). This is the preferred translation language for YouTube subtitles.
strings.auto_backup_description: Automatically backup your data to Downloads/SakayoriMusic folder
strings.no_playlist_found: No local playlists found, please create one first
strings.list_all_cookies_of_this_page: List all cookies of this page
strings.enable_liquid_glass_effect_description: Enable iOS's liquid glass effect in some position (Android 13+)
strings.very_low_performance_mode_description: For slow or low-memory devices. Disables blur, rainbow effects, reduces image cache to 32MB, and slows playback polling. Keeps the full UI layout intact.
strings.low_end_device_blur_disabled: This effect requires a device with at least 4GB RAM and 4 CPU cores. Your device does not meet these requirements, so this option has been disabled to prevent lag.
strings.desktop_webview_description:
Because of the limitations of Compose Multiplatform, I can not implement WebView on desktop.
Read this to learn more how to log in in desktop:

strings.rich_presence_info: Show media session info on your Discord profile
strings.desktop_rpc_auto_description: Automatically connects to Discord desktop app via local IPC
strings.keep_service_alive_description: Keep music player service alive to avoid being killed by system
strings.keep_your_youtube_playlist_offline: Keep showing your YouTube playlist when offline
strings.keep_your_youtube_playlist_offline_descr: Save your YT playlist to local and keep to show when offline
strings.combine_local_and_youtube_liked_songs: Replace Favorite by YouTube Liked when logged in
strings.combine_local_and_youtube_liked_songs_de: Using only YouTube Liked (not support like a song when offline)
strings.no_data_analytics: Please play some music to see analytics
strings.vote_submitted: Thank you for voting this lyrics!
